title: Partner Astronauts
text:
Astronauts from international space agencies who have trained or served with NASA Astronauts.
Quick Facts
An international partnership of five space agencies from 15 countries operates the International Space Station.
Over 260 individuals representing 20 countries and five International Partners have visited the International Space Station.
Through Expedition 60, the microgravity laboratory has hosted nearly 3,000 research investigations from researchers in more than 108 countries.
Partner & Commercial Astronauts
